name: WeChatMP-ThirdParty
description: Third-party platform-based OpenClaw WeChat Official Account (微信公众号) channel plugin

proxyUrl.description: WebSocket URL for receiving messages from OpenClaw.

appid.description: AppID of your WeChat Official Account (微信公众号) or OpenKfId of your WeChat Customer Service (企业微信客服).

apiKey.description: API Key for authenticating with the third-party platform.

proxyUrl.label: Third-party Platform API URL
proxyUrl.help: WebSocket URL (ws:// or wss://) for receiving messages from OpenClaw.

appid.label: AppID / OpenKfId
appid.help: AppID of your WeChat Official Account (微信公众号) or OpenKfId of your WeChat Customer Service (企业微信客服).

apiKey.label: API Key
apiKey.help: API Key for authenticating with the third-party platform.
